plan.failureSummary: The test failed during deterministic page.ai execution because the cached selector for 'Select your occupation' could not be resolved. The UI layout changed to display 'Age Group' instead of the occupation combobox, causing a stale cache / selector regression.
observedIndicators: DETERMINISTIC mode was active with stale cache
Cached selector for 'Select your occupation' failed to resolve
Failure screenshot shows 'Age Group' radio buttons instead of the occupation dropdown
The overall objective is highly flexible ('Fill out all of the survey questions...') and easily adaptable by the AI

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry the automation run
remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache and retry the test run. This will force the Donobu agent to run autonomously, analyze the active form fields ('Age Group'), and complete the survey successfully.

remediationSteps.summary: Consider disabling deterministic mode if the layout is highly dynamic
remediationSteps.details: If this survey is known to alternate layouts dynamically and frequently, consider disabling deterministic mode for this specific test so that it always executes autonomously and adapts to the active question set.

plan.notes: The survey appears to dynamically alternate between different question sets (e.g., displaying 'Set 1' in the failure screenshot, which has 'Age Group' instead of 'Select your occupation'). Because the run was in DETERMINISTIC mode, it tried to use cached steps from a different set/layout. Clearing the cache will allow the autonomous agent to dynamically adapt to whichever set is currently active.
